# io.relate { #tspaint.io.relate }

```python
tspaint.io.relate(
    source,
    *,
    mutation_rate=None,
    recombination_rate=1e-08,
    Ne=None,
    genetic_map=None,
    poplabels=None,
    estimate_population_size=True,
    seed=1,
    memory=None,
    num_iter=None,
    compress=True,
    workdir=None,
    relate_bin=None,
    file_formats_bin=None,
    eps_script=None,
    convert_bin=None,
    relate_args=None,
    m=None,
    r=None,
)
```

Infer a tree sequence from genotypes with **Relate**, end to end (CLAUDE.md §5).

The real-data analogue of :func:`tspaint.io.tsinfer` / :func:`tspaint.io.singer`: hand it
genotypes and get back a tskit tree sequence — it runs the whole Relate pipeline for you, so **no
Relate command line is required**:

1. write a haploid VCF and convert it to Relate haps/sample (``RelateFileFormats``);
2. infer genome-wide genealogies (``Relate --mode All``);
3. (default) re-estimate the coalescence-rate history and re-date branch lengths **genome-wide**
   (``EstimatePopulationSize`` — best on a whole chromosome, so give it one);
4. convert to tskit with ``--compress`` (:func:`relate_convert`; §5 persistence invariant).

Build the binaries once with ``tspaint install relate``. Paint the result with
``tspaint.paint(ts, labels, n_jobs=…)`` (or stream a huge chromosome with ``window_size=…,
out_dir=…``).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**source**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tskit.TreeSequence, str, or Variants]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Genotypes — a tree sequence with mutations, a **VCF**, a **VCF Zarr**, or a :class:`~tspaint.io_genotypes.Variants` (e.g. from :func:`~tspaint.io.subset_data`), resolved as for the other front ends. Each sample haplotype becomes one Relate haplotype, in order.

<code>[**mutation_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Per-base, per-generation mutation rate (Relate ``-m``; alias ``m``). **Required.**

<code>[**recombination_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1e-08]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Per-base recombination rate for a synthesised constant-rate genetic map (default ``1e-8``; alias ``r``). Ignored when ``genetic_map`` is given.

<code>[**Ne**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Diploid effective size for Relate's initial prior (``-N`` receives the haploid ``2·Ne``). Relate re-estimates it via ``EstimatePopulationSize``, so it is only a starting point; the default estimates it from the data (:func:`tspaint.io.estimate_ne`, all-pairs ``π / 4μ``).

<code>[**genetic_map**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Path to a Relate genetic map (``pos COMBINED_rate Genetic_Map``); default synthesises a flat one from ``recombination_rate``.

<code>[**poplabels**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Path to a ``.poplabels`` file for ``EstimatePopulationSize`` (population/group/sex per sample, in ``.sample`` order); default treats all samples as one population. Pass per-population labels for a structure-aware coalescence-rate estimate on an admixed / multi-species panel.

<code>[**estimate_population_size**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Run ``EstimatePopulationSize`` (step 3), the genome-wide branch-length recalibration (default ``True``). ``False`` converts Relate's initial ``--mode All`` trees directly (faster, less calibrated).

<code>[**seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Random seed for Relate and ``EstimatePopulationSize`` (default 1).

<code>[**memory**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Relate ``--memory`` (GB) hint for large data.

<code>[**num_iter**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   ``EstimatePopulationSize`` iterations (default: the script's own).

<code>[**compress**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Convert with ``--compress`` (default ``True`` — load-bearing, §5).

<code>[**workdir**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Directory for the intermediate files (default: a fresh tempdir).

<code>[**relate_bin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Override the ``Relate`` / ``RelateFileFormats`` / ``EstimatePopulationSize.sh`` / ``Convert`` paths (defaults: the ``tspaint install relate`` build locations).

<code>[**file_formats_bin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Override the ``Relate`` / ``RelateFileFormats`` / ``EstimatePopulationSize.sh`` / ``Convert`` paths (defaults: the ``tspaint install relate`` build locations).

<code>[**eps_script**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Override the ``Relate`` / ``RelateFileFormats`` / ``EstimatePopulationSize.sh`` / ``Convert`` paths (defaults: the ``tspaint install relate`` build locations).

<code>[**convert_bin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Override the ``Relate`` / ``RelateFileFormats`` / ``EstimatePopulationSize.sh`` / ``Convert`` paths (defaults: the ``tspaint install relate`` build locations).

<code>[**relate_args**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Extra flags appended verbatim to ``Relate --mode All``.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The Relate tree sequence (node ids stable across trees via ``--compress``; branch lengths in generations). Sample nodes are in input order; for a **VCF** / **VCF-Zarr** / ``Variants`` source the source's sample ids are stamped on them (:func:`tspaint.ids.attach_sample_ids`), so :func:`tspaint.paint` accepts ``labels`` keyed by sample-ID string as well as by node index.

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[FileNotFoundError](`FileNotFoundError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If a required Relate binary is absent (build them with ``tspaint install relate``).

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[RuntimeError](`RuntimeError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If a Relate step fails.
